name: avtovelomoto.by
message: [AI generated] Avtovelomoto.by is a leading automotive and motorcycle retail company based in Belarus. They offer an extensive range of products including spare parts, motorcycles, bicycles, ATV's, snowmobiles, as well as accessories and equipment for these vehicles. Their diverse product range caters to both amateur and professional enthusiasts. They pride themselves in providing high quality products, customer-friendly services, and competitive pricing.
